name: Triboulet

sheet.name: Triboulet
sheet.background_story:
Proud member of the Noxian Jesters and a perpetual fool, Triboulet makes light of every situation no matter how grave it may be.

Always cracking jokes in the face of danger and tragedy has estranged Triboulet from many who do not appreciate their overtly dark sense of humor.

Since the Battle of the Burning Church, she has ventured to The Festival grounds with Punchline. Together, the two hope to find The Nameless Charter again and a great quantity of Noxium Brew.

description:
